where you've cockblocked Gojo all day.


_______________



so. I got ringworm which is why I was MIA 😭

it was from my baby kitten (he's 8 weeks). and i didn't realise he had ringworm so i was in too much contact with him and got it 😓

its truly the worst. i got antifungal medicine for it but its soooo ugly. i have to wear long sleeved shirts everywhere now just to hide them 😣

just to note, i have some final exams coming up next week so my uploads may not be consistent for a bit. i graduate uni this year so i want to at least go out doing my best in my last exams 😭

enjoy my latest upload 🫶🏼
